description: Pehle Pankha Aayega Phir Bijli Aayegi. Mystery narrative with repeated catchphrase creating curiosity. Reveals brand electrification initiative at the end. Named among top 10 Indian ads of 2024.
why_included: Infrastructure brand making infrastructure interesting through mystery narrative. Directly relevant: broadband is infrastructure too. Curiosity-gap plus catchphrase combo is a retention machine.
